parameters.query:
SELECT
  s.id,
  s.name,
  COALESCE(
    s.metadata->>'slug',
    lower(regexp_replace(s.name, '[^a-zA-Z0-9]+', '-', 'g'))
  ) AS slug,
  s.metadata->>'id'   AS uex_system_id,
  s.metadata->>'code' AS system_code,
  s.metadata->>'is_available_live' AS is_available_live,

  -- Bodies (planets + moons) in this system
  COALESCE(bodies.body_total, 0)              AS bodies_total,
  COALESCE(bodies.bodies_list, '[]'::jsonb)   AS bodies_list,

  -- Major locations in this system (cities, big hubs, etc.)
  COALESCE(mlocs.major_locations_total, 0)            AS major_locations_total,
  COALESCE(mlocs.major_locations_list, '[]'::jsonb)   AS major_locations_list

FROM systems s
JOIN active_systems asys
  ON asys.id = s.id

LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT
    b.system_id,
    COUNT(*) AS body_total,
    jsonb_agg(b.name ORDER BY b.name) AS bodies_list
  FROM bodies b
  WHERE COALESCE(b.metadata->>'is_available_live','1') = '1'
  GROUP BY b.system_id
) AS bodies
  ON bodies.system_id = s.id

LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT
    l.system_id,
    COUNT(*) AS major_locations_total,
    jsonb_agg(l.name ORDER BY l.name) AS major_locations_list
  FROM locations l
  WHERE
    -- Cities are always major
    l.location_type = 'city'
    OR COALESCE(l.metadata->>'is_major_location','0') = '1'
    OR l.location_type IN ('space_station','landing_zone','major_location')
  GROUP BY l.system_id
) AS mlocs
  ON mlocs.system_id = s.id

WHERE s.id = '{{$json["id"]}}';

SELECT
  s.id,
  s.name,
  COALESCE(
    s.metadata->>'slug',
    lower(regexp_replace(s.name, '[^a-zA-Z0-9]+', '-', 'g'))
  ) AS slug
FROM systems s
JOIN active_systems asys
  ON asys.id = s.id
ORDER BY s.name;
